text: DIFC Courts Order No. 1 of 2016 – The DIFC Courts Small Claims Tribunal – Additional Members of the SCT
APRIL 19, 2016 COURT ADMINISTRATIVE ORDERS
Order No. 1 of 2016DIFC Courts (/glossary/difc-courts/)
In respect of
The DIFC Courts Small Claims – Additional Members of the SCTTribunal (/glossary/tribunal/)
I, Michael Hwang, of the Dubai International Financial Centre Chief Justice (/glossary/chief-justice/) , Courts (/glossary/court/)
Having reviewed—

Dubai Law No. 9 of 2004 in respect of the establishment of the ;DIFC (/glossary/difc/) Dubai Law No. 12 Of 2004 in respect of the Judicial Authority at the DIFC; DIFC Law No. 10 of 2004 in respect of the DIFC Courts (“DIFC Courts Law”);
DIFC Courts Order No. 2 of 2007 establishing the Small Claims Tribunal (“SCT”);
DIFC Courts Order No. 1 of 2010 – Limits of ; Jurisdiction (/glossary/jurisdiction/)
DIFC Courts Order No. 1 of 2014 – Members of the SCT
Practice Direction No. 2 of 2010 – SCT ; andJudge (/glossary/judge/)
Part 53 of the of the DIFC CourtsRules (/glossary/rules/)
And Whereas –

(A)  The DIFC Courts Law authorises the Chief Justice of the DIFC Courts, where he considers it appropriate, to set up and administer Tribunals of the DIFC Courts, and to authorise for their administration, which shall be set out in the Rules of rules (/glossary/rules/) (Article 14(3)). Court (/glossary/court/)
(B) The SCT was established pursuant to DIFC Courts Order No. 2 of 2007 issued by the then Chief Justice, Sir Anthony Evans.

(C) The Rules of the DIFC Courts (the “RDC”) have been enacted by His Highness The of Dubai pursuant to Article 31(1) of the andRuler (/glossary/ruler/) Court Law (/glossary/court-law/) contain at Part 53 the rules relating to the SCT; and
(D) The SCT is recognised as a mechanism for the prompt and cost-effi cient hearing and determination of smaller claims within the of the DIFC Courts. jurisdiction (/glossary/jurisdiction/)
Now I hereby order and direct as follows –

Ayesha Bin Kalban and Ms. Mahika Hart shall be appointed as members of the SCT. Where the RDC refers to a “SCT Judge” this shall include the Court of First Instance andJudges (/glossary/judge/) and all other persons named in this Order and DIFC Courts Order 1 ofRegistrar (/glossary/registrar/) 2010 (Limits of Jurisdiction) as members of the SCT.

This Order shall take effect from the date of signature. Order No. 2 of 2007 shall remain in full force and effect save as amended by this Order. This Order shall be known as The DIFC Small Claims Tribunal – Additional Members of the SCT Order No. 1 of 2016.
Dated:  14 April 2016
Chief Justice Michael Hwang
